backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single change: replacing the second anchor link text in the Footer component with the word 'Details'.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, hook, config, and asset's purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA with meta tags, manifest link, apple-touch-icon references to the profile avatar, and service worker registration.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web App Manifest for Legend X Esports configuring standalone display, red theme color, Urdu language, and profile avatar as the app icon.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy with background refresh for GET requests, skipping cross-origin and /api/ calls, with offline fallback to index.html.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements via add/edit/delete forms backed by React Query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Announcement card component that displays a formatted nanosecond timestamp, title, body excerpt, and a hover-revealed 'Read More' indicator with accent decorations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, tagline, social media links (X, Discord, WhatsApp, YouTube, Instagram), quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the 'Legend X Esports' title, tagline, CTA buttons linking to roster and about sections, and three stat counters.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' external link button, and a collapsible mobile menu with scroll-based background change.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of announcement cards fetched via the useAnnouncements hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a single player's avatar, name, and role in a styled card with hover effects, falling back to a default avatar image on error.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: React component that displays the team roster grid with loading, error, and empty states, fetching data via the useRoster hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the design system and utility classes for esports-themed glows, typography, and clip paths.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component that composes the Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom esports color tokens, fonts, shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing features, and a completed feature request to replace anchor link text in the Footer component.
